parameters.query:
WITH uex_gv AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (v.slug)
    v.id              AS vehicle_uuid,
    v.source_id,
    v.name,
    v.name_full,
    v.slug            AS uex_slug,
    v.company_name,
    v.scu,
    v.crew_min,
    v.crew_max,
    v.pad_type,
    v.game_version,
    v.is_spaceship,
    v.is_ground_vehicle,
    v.is_concept,
    v.is_quantum_capable,
    v.metadata,
    vl.id             AS vlink_id
  FROM vehicles v
  LEFT JOIN datap4k_vehicle_links vl
    ON vl.vehicle_id = v.id AND vl.raw_table = 'datap4k_ground_vehicles_raw'
  WHERE v.is_ground_vehicle = true
  ORDER BY v.slug,
    CASE WHEN vl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    v.source_id
),
dp4k_enrich AS (
  SELECT
    vl.vehicle_id          AS vehicle_uuid,
    gv.id                  AS dp4k_id,
    gv.name                AS dp4k_name,
    gv.manufacturer,
    gv.manufacturer_code,
    gv.role,
    gv.career,
    gv.drive,
    gv.crew,
    gv.hull_hp,
    gv.width_m,
    gv.height_m,
    gv.length_m,
    gv.insurance_wait_min,
    gv.insurance_expedite_auec,
    gv.weapon_port_count,
    gv.source_id           AS dp4k_source_id,
    gv.source_slug,
    gv.is_base_variant,
    gv.variant_of
  FROM datap4k_ground_vehicles_norm gv
  JOIN datap4k_vehicle_links vl ON vl.id = gv.vehicle_link_id
),
purchase_prices AS (
  SELECT
    vpp.vehicle_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_name',            vpp.terminal_name,
        'terminal_code',            vpp.terminal_code,
        'terminal_is_player_owned', vpp.terminal_is_player_owned,
        'star_system_name',         vpp.star_system_name,
        'city_name',                vpp.city_name,
        'planet_name',              vpp.planet_name,
        'orbit_name',               vpp.orbit_name,
        'price_buy',                vpp.price_buy,
        'price_buy_avg',            vpp.price_buy_avg,
        'price_buy_min',            vpp.price_buy_min,
        'price_buy_max',            vpp.price_buy_max,
        'game_version',             vpp.game_version
      ) ORDER BY vpp.terminal_name
    ) AS buy_locations
  FROM vehicle_purchase_prices vpp
  GROUP BY vpp.vehicle_id
),
rental_prices AS (
  SELECT
    vrp.vehicle_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_name',            vrp.terminal_name,
        'terminal_code',            vrp.terminal_code,
        'terminal_is_player_owned', vrp.terminal_is_player_owned,
        'star_system_name',         vrp.star_system_name,
        'city_name',                vrp.city_name,
        'planet_name',              vrp.planet_name,
        'orbit_name',               vrp.orbit_name,
        'price_rent',               vrp.price_rent,
        'price_rent_avg',           vrp.price_rent_avg,
        'price_rent_min',           vrp.price_rent_min,
        'price_rent_max',           vrp.price_rent_max,
        'game_version',             vrp.game_version
      ) ORDER BY vrp.terminal_name
    ) AS rent_locations
  FROM vehicle_rental_prices vrp
  GROUP BY vrp.vehicle_id
),
store_prices AS (
  SELECT
    vsp.vehicle_id,
    jsonb_object_agg(
      vsp.currency,
      jsonb_build_object(
        'price',              vsp.price,
        'price_package',      vsp.price_package,
        'price_warbond',      vsp.price_warbond,
        'price_concierge',    vsp.price_concierge,
        'on_sale',            vsp.on_sale,
        'on_sale_package',    vsp.on_sale_package,
        'on_sale_warbond',    vsp.on_sale_warbond,
        'on_sale_concierge',  vsp.on_sale_concierge,
        'game_version',       vsp.game_version
      )
    ) AS store_data
  FROM vehicle_store_prices vsp
  GROUP BY vsp.vehicle_id
),
dp4k_only AS (
  SELECT * FROM datap4k_ground_vehicles_norm
  WHERE vehicle_link_id IS NULL
),
-- Dedup crossref to guarantee at most 1 row per slug anchor per part of the UNION ALL.
esc_by_uex AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (uex_slug) id, entity_type, datap4k_slug, uex_slug, rsi_slug, source, verified
  FROM entity_slug_crossref
  WHERE entity_type = 'ground_vehicle' AND uex_slug IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY uex_slug, id
),
esc_by_dp4k AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (datap4k_slug) id, entity_type, datap4k_slug, uex_slug, rsi_slug, source, verified
  FROM entity_slug_crossref
  WHERE entity_type = 'ground_vehicle' AND datap4k_slug IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY datap4k_slug, id
),
rsi_matrix AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) id, slug, production_status, focus, size, url,
    image_store_large, image_slideshow, min_crew, max_crew,
    height_m, length_m, cargo_scu, manufacturer_code, manufacturer_name
  FROM rsi_ship_matrix_norm
  WHERE slug IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY slug, id
)

INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)

-- Part A: UEX-based rows (50 after UTV dedup)
SELECT
  u.uex_slug,
  'ground_vehicle',
  u.name_full,
  u.company_name,
  COALESCE(de.career, 'ground_vehicle'),
  split_part(u.source_id, ':', 2)::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                 u.name,
    'name_full',            u.name_full,
    'uex_slug',             u.uex_slug,
    'source_id',            u.source_id,
    'uex_uuid',             u.vehicle_uuid::text,
    'company_name',         u.company_name,
    'scu',                  u.scu,
    'crew_min',             u.crew_min,
    'crew_max',             u.crew_max,
    'pad_type',             u.pad_type,
    'game_version',         u.game_version,
    'is_spaceship',         u.is_spaceship,
    'is_ground_vehicle',    u.is_ground_vehicle,
    'is_concept',           u.is_concept,
    'is_quantum_capable',   u.is_quantum_capable,
    'url_photo',            u.metadata->'raw'->>'url_photo',
    'url_store',            u.metadata->'raw'->>'url_store',
    'url_video',            u.metadata->'raw'->>'url_video',
    'url_hotsite',          u.metadata->'raw'->>'url_hotsite',
    'url_brochure',         u.metadata->'raw'->>'url_brochure',
    'url_photos',           u.metadata->'raw'->>'url_photos',
    'width',                (u.metadata->'raw'->>'width')::numeric,
    'height',               (u.metadata->'raw'->>'height')::numeric,
    'length',               (u.metadata->'raw'->>'length')::numeric,
    'mass',                 (u.metadata->'raw'->>'mass')::numeric,
    'uex_crew',             u.metadata->'raw'->>'crew',
    'fuel_hydrogen',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'fuel_hydrogen')::numeric,
    'fuel_quantum',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'fuel_quantum')::numeric,
    'id_parent',            (u.metadata->'raw'->>'id_parent')::integer,
    'id_company',           (u.metadata->'raw'->>'id_company')::integer,
    'ids_vehicles_loaners', u.metadata->'raw'->>'ids_vehicles_loaners',
    'container_sizes',      u.metadata->'raw'->>'container_sizes',
    'date_added',           (u.metadata->'raw'->>'date_added')::bigint,
    'date_modified',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'date_modified')::bigint,
    'flags', jsonb_build_object(
      'is_addon',           (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_addon')::int::boolean,
      'is_bomber',          (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_bomber')::int::boolean,
      'is_cargo',           (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_cargo')::int::boolean,
      'is_carrier',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_carrier')::int::boolean,
      'is_civilian',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_civilian')::int::boolean,
      'is_concept',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_concept')::int::boolean,
      'is_construction',    (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_construction')::int::boolean,
      'is_datarunner',      (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_datarunner')::int::boolean,
      'is_docking',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_docking')::int::boolean,
      'is_emp',             (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_emp')::int::boolean,
      'is_exploration',     (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_exploration')::int::boolean,
      'is_hangar',          (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_hangar')::int::boolean,
      'is_industrial',      (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_industrial')::int::boolean,
      'is_interdiction',    (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_interdiction')::int::boolean,
      'is_loading_dock',    (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_loading_dock')::int::boolean,
      'is_medical',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_medical')::int::boolean,
      'is_military',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_military')::int::boolean,
      'is_mining',          (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_mining')::int::boolean,
      'is_passenger',       (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_passenger')::int::boolean,
      'is_qed',             (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_qed')::int::boolean,
      'is_racing',          (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_racing')::int::boolean,
      'is_refuel',          (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_refuel')::int::boolean,
      'is_refinery',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_refinery')::int::boolean,
      'is_repair',          (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_repair')::int::boolean,
      'is_research',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_research')::int::boolean,
      'is_salvage',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_salvage')::int::boolean,
      'is_scanning',        (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_scanning')::int::boolean,
      'is_science',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_science')::int::boolean,
      'is_showdown_winner', (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_showdown_winner')::int::boolean,
      'is_spaceship',       u.is_spaceship,
      'is_starter',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_starter')::int::boolean,
      'is_stealth',         (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_stealth')::int::boolean,
      'is_tractor_beam',    (u.metadata->'raw'->>'is_tractor_beam')::int::boolean
    ),
    'metadata',           u.metadata,
    'datap4k', CASE WHEN de.dp4k_id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'name',                    de.dp4k_name,
      'manufacturer',            de.manufacturer,
      'manufacturer_code',       de.manufacturer_code,
      'role',                    de.role,
      'career',                  de.career,
      'drive',                   de.drive,
      'crew',                    de.crew,
      'hull_hp',                 de.hull_hp,
      'width_m',                 de.width_m,
      'height_m',                de.height_m,
      'length_m',                de.length_m,
      'insurance_wait_min',      de.insurance_wait_min,
      'insurance_expedite_auec', de.insurance_expedite_auec,
      'weapon_port_count',       de.weapon_port_count,
      'source_id',               de.dp4k_source_id,
      'source_slug',             de.source_slug,
      'is_base_variant',         de.is_base_variant,
      'variant_of',              de.variant_of
    ) ELSE NULL END,
    'purchase_prices', COALESCE(pp.buy_locations, '[]'::jsonb),
    'rental_prices',   COALESCE(rp.rent_locations, '[]'::jsonb),
    'store_price',     sp.store_data,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END,
    'rsi', CASE WHEN rn.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'slug',              rn.slug,
      'production_status', rn.production_status,
      'focus',             rn.focus,
      'size',              rn.size,
      'url',               rn.url,
      'image_store_large', rn.image_store_large,
      'image_slideshow',   rn.image_slideshow,
      'min_crew',          rn.min_crew,
      'max_crew',          rn.max_crew,
      'height_m',          rn.height_m,
      'length_m',          rn.length_m,
      'cargo_scu',         rn.cargo_scu,
      'manufacturer_code', rn.manufacturer_code,
      'manufacturer_name', rn.manufacturer_name
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(u.name_full, '')    || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(u.name, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(u.company_name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(de.role, '')        || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(de.career, '')      || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(de.manufacturer, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM uex_gv u
LEFT JOIN dp4k_enrich de ON de.vehicle_uuid = u.vehicle_uuid
LEFT JOIN purchase_prices pp ON pp.vehicle_id = u.vehicle_uuid
LEFT JOIN rental_prices rp ON rp.vehicle_id = u.vehicle_uuid
LEFT JOIN store_prices sp ON sp.vehicle_id = u.vehicle_uuid
LEFT JOIN esc_by_uex esc ON esc.uex_slug = u.uex_slug
LEFT JOIN rsi_matrix rn   ON rn.slug = esc.rsi_slug

UNION ALL

-- Part B: datap4k-only rows (2: Tumbril Nova, RSI Ursa Medivac Wikelo Special)
SELECT
  gv.slug,
  'ground_vehicle',
  gv.name,
  gv.manufacturer,
  gv.career,
  NULL,
  gv.is_base_variant,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',               gv.name,
    'name_full',          gv.name,
    'manufacturer',       gv.manufacturer,
    'manufacturer_code',  gv.manufacturer_code,
    'role',               gv.role,
    'career',             gv.career,
    'drive',              gv.drive,
    'crew',               gv.crew,
    'hull_hp',            gv.hull_hp,
    'width_m',            gv.width_m,
    'height_m',           gv.height_m,
    'length_m',           gv.length_m,
    'insurance_wait_min',      gv.insurance_wait_min,
    'insurance_expedite_auec', gv.insurance_expedite_auec,
    'weapon_port_count',  gv.weapon_port_count,
    'source_slug',        gv.source_slug,
    'is_concept',         NULL,
    'datap4k', jsonb_build_object(
      'name',                    gv.name,
      'manufacturer',            gv.manufacturer,
      'manufacturer_code',       gv.manufacturer_code,
      'role',                    gv.role,
      'career',                  gv.career,
      'drive',                   gv.drive,
      'crew',                    gv.crew,
      'hull_hp',                 gv.hull_hp,
      'width_m',                 gv.width_m,
      'height_m',                gv.height_m,
      'length_m',                gv.length_m,
      'insurance_wait_min',      gv.insurance_wait_min,
      'insurance_expedite_auec', gv.insurance_expedite_auec,
      'weapon_port_count',       gv.weapon_port_count,
      'source_id',               gv.source_id,
      'source_slug',             gv.source_slug,
      'is_base_variant',         gv.is_base_variant,
      'variant_of',              gv.variant_of
    ),
    'purchase_prices', '[]'::jsonb,
    'rental_prices',   '[]'::jsonb,
    'store_price',     NULL,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END,
    'rsi', CASE WHEN rn.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'slug',              rn.slug,
      'production_status', rn.production_status,
      'focus',             rn.focus,
      'size',              rn.size,
      'url',               rn.url,
      'image_store_large', rn.image_store_large,
      'image_slideshow',   rn.image_slideshow,
      'min_crew',          rn.min_crew,
      'max_crew',          rn.max_crew,
      'height_m',          rn.height_m,
      'length_m',          rn.length_m,
      'cargo_scu',         rn.cargo_scu,
      'manufacturer_code', rn.manufacturer_code,
      'manufacturer_name', rn.manufacturer_name
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(gv.name, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(gv.manufacturer, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(gv.role, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(gv.career, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM dp4k_only gv
LEFT JOIN esc_by_dp4k esc ON esc.datap4k_slug = gv.slug
LEFT JOIN rsi_matrix rn   ON rn.slug = esc.rsi_slug

ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
